The thesis is supply unlock and durability of GLP-1 demand — both catalysts that play out over 2026.

revenue_growth.detail: Revenue growth 21.7% — within 15-30% borderline band; OCI/AI infrastructure ramping but legacy software still drags.

earnings_accel.detail: Earnings growth 24.5% > revenue growth 21.7% — modest operating leverage.

Total debt $162B against $39B cash and 415% debt/equity — balance sheet stretched. Thesis only works if AI revenue ramps fast enough to convert capex into cash. Until FCF turns positive, this is a 'show me' name.

The AI-cloud thesis is real and the order book legitimate, but until capex begins converting to cash, valuation risk is asymmetric to the downside. Watchlist with a target entry well below current $180.
